tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
description: AutoStream is an AI-powered video editing SaaS platform designed for YouTubers, Instagram Reels creators, TikTokers, and professional content creators. It automates repetitive editing tasks so you can focus on creating great content.

pro.name: Pro Plan
features: AI thumbnail generator with A/B testing
Direct publish to YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn

enterprise.name: Enterprise Plan
features: Custom AI model training on your content

policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase. Within the first 7 days, full refund is available — no questions asked.
policies.free_trial: Both Basic and Pro plans include a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

support.basic: Email support with 48-hour response time, Mon–Fri 9AM–6PM EST.
support.pro: 24/7 priority chat and phone support, average response under 2 hours.
support.enterprise: Dedicated account manager + 24/7 support with 30-minute SLA.

policies.cancellation: Cancel anytime from your dashboard. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
policies.plan_changes: Upgrade anytime (immediate, prorated billing). Downgrade takes effect next billing cycle.
policies.data_privacy: AutoStream does not sell or share your video data. All videos are encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3).
policies.storage_after_cancel: Videos are kept in cloud for 90 days after cancellation. Download anytime before permanent deletion.
policies.team_seats: Pro plan includes up to 5 seats. Each member gets individual login. Admins manage permissions from team dashboard.

ai_captions.name: AI Captions & Subtitles
ai_captions.description: Auto-generate captions in 40+ languages with ~95% accuracy. Fully editable with custom fonts and colors. Export as SRT/VTT for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram.

brand_kit.name: Brand Kit
brand_kit.description: Upload your logo, set brand colors and fonts. AutoStream applies your identity to every export — intros, outros, lower thirds, captions.

direct_publish.name: Direct Publish Integration
direct_publish.description: Publish and schedule content directly from AutoStream. Manage your full content calendar in one place.

analytics.name: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Track views, watch time, engagement, and subscriber growth across connected platforms. Get AI-generated content recommendations.

api_access.name: REST API Access
api_access.description: Automate video uploads, edits, and exports programmatically. Great for agencies and developer workflows.

short_form.name: Short-Form Content Tools
short_form.description: Templates and aspect ratios for vertical 9:16 content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts). AI highlight detection to auto-trim long videos into short clips.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes! Both Basic and Pro plans have a 7-day free trial — no credit card required. Full feature access during trial.

faq.question: Does AutoStream add a watermark?
faq.answer: Basic plan exports have an AutoStream watermark. Pro and Enterprise exports are completely watermark-free.

faq.question: How accurate are AI captions?
faq.answer: About 95% accuracy on clear audio. Captions are fully editable before you export.

faq.question: Can I use AutoStream for TikTok and Reels?
faq.answer: Yes! AutoStream has vertical 9:16 templates and AI highlight detection to create short clips from long videos.

faq.question: How many team members can I add?
faq.answer: Pro plan supports up to 5 seats. Enterprise supports unlimited seats.

faq.question: What video formats can I upload?
faq.answer: We accept MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, and FLV. Exports are in MP4 or MOV.

faq.question: Is my content safe?
faq.answer: Yes. Videos are encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We never sell your data.

faq.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.answer: Yes. Cancel from your dashboard anytime. Access continues till end of billing period.

faq.question: Is there a video length limit?
faq.answer: Basic: up to 15 minutes. Pro: up to 4 hours. Enterprise: no limit.

faq.question: What happens to my videos after I cancel?
faq.answer: Your videos are stored for 90 days post-cancellation. Download them anytime before permanent deletion.

faq.question: Do you offer annual billing discounts?
faq.answer: Yes! Save ~20% with annual billing. Basic becomes $23/month, Pro becomes $63/month.

faq.question: Is there an API?
faq.answer: Yes, REST API access is available on Pro and Enterprise plans for automating workflows.

faq.question: Can I publish directly to YouTube or TikTok?
faq.answer: Yes, on Pro and Enterprise plans you can publish and schedule directly to YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes. Upgrades are immediate with prorated billing. Downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.

comparison_summary.best_for_basic: Solo creators uploading under 10 videos/month who want simple, affordable editing without advanced AI features.
comparison_summary.best_for_pro: Serious YouTubers, TikTokers, and small agencies who need unlimited editing, AI captions, branding tools, and team collaboration.
comparison_summary.best_for_enterprise: Large media companies and agencies needing custom workflows, white-labeling, and dedicated support.
